market_pulse: Strong weekend activation across all major venues with heavy EDM/electronic focus; LIV's DJ residencies (Dombresky, Josh Baker) and Kromi this weekend position well against Tiësto-led Encore and OMNIA's heavy hitters.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: LIV Beach: Kromi today (6/21), strong TikTok engagement
OMNIA: Steve Aoki (6/19), DJ Paul D (6/20), solid follower base
Encore: Acraze booked (6/14), talent roster active
Competitors heavy on mainstream EDM and rap crossovers
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Ensure Kromi promo is live across Stories + Reels before 6PM. Highlight bottle specials and comparison to competing day parties. Monitor David Guetta mentions from May residency for social sentiment.

content_gaps.description: R&B/Hip-Hop crossover audio trending on TikTok (Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays, Cardi B after-party buzz) but minimal LIV/LIV Beach acknowledgment of this trend.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create LIV-specific 'R&B Late Nights' content series targeting crossover audiences; align with future talent bookings in that genre.

content_gaps.description: Competitor venues (Zouk, XS, OMNIA) seeing consistent outfit/vibe verification TikToks. LIV Beach is being searched but UGC feels light compared to volume.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch hashtag campaign (#LIVBeachWeekend) targeting outfit creators; offer early access/comp tables for top TikTok creators.

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club, OMNIA Dayclub, and Encore Beach aggressively posting 24h story sequences (Friday → Saturday → Sunday countdowns). LIV Beach less visible in search results for story activity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Ensure LIV Beach Stories are updated minimum 2x per day through weekend; run daily 'Day vs Night' story arcs to maintain presence.

influencer_activity.mention: Kromi performing at LIV Beach today (6/21); strong residency builder. Search results confirm active bookings.
Steve Aoki at OMNIA Nightclub (6/19). Major draw; competitive threat for talent prestige.
Tiësto at LIV Beach (confirmed from June bio: 'SAT, June 20 - @tiesto'). Major headline; competitive parity with OMNIA/Encore.
DJ Snake slated for TAO Beach EDC Week day parties; not yet LIV-booked this cycle.

liv_outreach_targets.creator: @globeth0tter
liv_outreach_targets.reasoning: EDC week LIV engagement visible; micro-influencer with high EDC audience alignment.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Offer comp table for Kromi (6/21) + reels bonus.
